title: webera longifolia
intro: Webera longifolia, also known as the "Kadupul Flower" or "Queen of the Night", is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a tropical plant that is native to Sri Lanka and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Webera longifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
